case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY VS. DEMARCO J. BYRD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,902.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT BYRD, DEMARCO J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY BYRD, DEMARCO J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.50) SERVED MAY-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BYRD, DEMARCO J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYRD, DEMARCO J. $1,902.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,902.00, COSTS WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUL-15-2009 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PROO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
